task_text: Draft a status update email to Meridian Group summarizing where Project Helios stands this week. Tone should be professional and reassuring. Save the draft as meridian_status_email_draft.txt.

input.content:
Subject: Project Helios Weekly Status Update

Dear Meridian Group,

I’m writing to share this week’s status update for Project Helios. Overall, the project remains on track, with continued progress across the current workstreams and no major issues requiring escalation at this time.

This week, the team focused on advancing the planned deliverables, validating open items, and coordinating next steps to maintain momentum. Key activities are progressing as expected, and we are continuing to monitor dependencies closely to ensure upcoming milestones remain achievable.

At this stage, there are no significant changes to the project timeline or scope. Any minor open items are being actively managed, and we will continue to provide updates as they are resolved.

Next week, the team will continue execution against the current plan, follow up on outstanding action items, and prepare for the next set of project milestones.

Thank you for your continued partnership and engagement. We remain confident in the project’s direction and will keep you informed of any material developments.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
